user_system_path: The Master Bible is reference authority and issue #194 is the active first money-loop seam. ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml must point at the same issue and the queue file must remain inactive/reference-only.
no_routing_contract: The Agent is forbidden from asking 'What is next?' or 'Should we audit this?'. The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, and the source-truth map and follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not deviate from the source-truth activation without a signed-off source-truth closeout commit from Brandon.
allowed_files_raw: Current seam is source-truth activation only: keep the Master Bible reference-only, point the repo at issue #194, and align source-truth plus gate/test files without starting product implementation.
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/provider/schema/Supabase/Vercel/live Slack/PR #142/Stripe/auth/landing/dashboard work, no package/dependency changes, no data mutation, no migrations, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup.

acceptance_condition: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, and docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md all agree that issue #194 is the active first money-loop seam, the Master Bible remains reference authority, and the queue file remains inactive/reference-only. No product/runtime implementation starts in this change.
stop_condition: Stop when the source-truth activation and gate/test layer both accept issue #194 as active with no queue activation.

anti_regression_checks: issue #194 is the active first money-loop seam
